user.title: Connect UniFi Etherlighting
user.description: Sign in locally, validate the explicit UniFi Site, and read compatible switches. Setup never writes.

devices.title: Select Etherlighting switches
devices.description: Only switches matching the exactly validated read, write, model, firmware, and Network schema are available.

error.insufficient_permissions: Sign-in succeeded, but the UniFi account cannot read the required controller data.
error.validation_session: The HTTP session could not be created safely (stage: session).
error.validation_login: The login response did not match the confirmed schema (stage: login).
error.validation_version_read: The Network version did not match the confirmed read schema (stage: version_read).
error.validation_device_read: The Device list did not match the confirmed read schema (stage: device_read).
error.validation_compatibility: The compatibility check failed unexpectedly (stage: compatibility).
error.validation_logout: The temporary controller logout failed (stage: logout).
error.invalid_ssl: The TLS certificate could not be verified.
error.site_not_found: The UniFi Site could not be read.
error.no_devices: No devices were returned for this UniFi Site.
error.no_compatible_devices: No switch matches the exactly confirmed Etherlighting control combination.
error.unsupported_network_version: This Network Application version is not confirmed for Etherlighting writes.
error.unsupported_firmware: The detected switch firmware is not confirmed for Etherlighting writes.
error.invalid_site: The UniFi Site may only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

abort.unknown: The setup flow lost its validated connection state.

authentication_failed.title: UniFi authentication failed
authentication_failed.description: The local controller rejected or could not restore the authenticated session.

network_version_unconfirmed.title: Network Application version not confirmed
network_version_unconfirmed.description: Etherlighting writes are disabled because the runtime Network Application version is not the exact validated version.

unsupported_combination.title: Switch combination not supported
unsupported_combination.description: The detected controller, model, firmware, or Etherlighting schema is outside the exact confirmed tuple.

etherlighting_field_missing.title: Etherlighting control field missing
etherlighting_field_missing.description: The selected switch no longer exposes the confirmed Etherlighting control fields.

write_unverified.title: Etherlighting write could not be verified
write_unverified.description: The controller state did not provide a safe Read-after-Write confirmation.

api_schema_mismatch.title: UniFi API schema changed
api_schema_mismatch.description: A confirmed response no longer matches the validated response structure.

write_blocked.title: Etherlighting writes temporarily blocked
write_blocked.description: An indeterminate write result blocked further writes for the affected switch until operator review.

write_configuration_incomplete.title: Etherlighting controls are read-only
write_configuration_incomplete.description: Etherlighting state can be read. Writes are blocked because the complete device configuration used by the UniFi interface has not yet been safely confirmed.
